name: python3-pyee
title: python3-pyee
summary: Python 3 port of node.js's EventEmitter to Python
description:
Python 3 port of node.js's EventEmitter to Python
This package contains the pyee module for Python 3. pyee supplies an
EventEmitter object similar to the EventEmitter from node.js. This allows
developers to register a function to an event, which means that when the event
is emitted, the function will be called.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyee because Python 3 port of node.js's EventEmitter to Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyee as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyee with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyee --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
